name: pasty
title: Pasty
description: Clipboard manager — search, paste, and continuous-paste your Pasty history from Raycast.
author: ivygain

commands.name: search-clips
commands.title: Search Clips
commands.subtitle: Pasty
commands.description: Search your full clipboard history captured by Pasty.

commands.name: paste-snippet
commands.title: Paste Snippet
commands.subtitle: Pasty
commands.description: Browse snippet folders captured by Pasty.

commands.name: recent-images
commands.title: Recent Images
commands.subtitle: Pasty
commands.description: Browse recent image clips captured by Pasty.

preferences.name: dbPath
preferences.title: Pasty Database Path
preferences.description: Path to clips.sqlite. Defaults to ~/Library/Application Support/Pasty/clips.sqlite

preferences.name: closeOnPaste
preferences.title: Close after pasting
preferences.label: Close Raycast after pressing Enter to paste
preferences.description: When checked, Raycast closes itself right after Enter pastes the selected clip. Uncheck for always-on continuous-paste mode.

preferences.name: pageSize
preferences.title: Page Size
preferences.description: How many clips to fetch per query.
